baal: noun. A false deity or idol.
bal: noun. The surface of a mine.

bell: noun. A percussive instrument made of metal or other hard material, typically but not always in the shape of an inverted cup with a flared
bull: noun. An adult male, specifically: An adult male of domesticated cattle or oxen.
bulla: noun. A blister, vesicle, or other thin-walled cavity or lesion, as: Such a blister that is more than 5 mm in diameter.
